evals.prompt: Write the demo script for Citizens Bank. Michael De La Cruz will be our only contact in the meeting — Joe Burke won't be there. Keep it focused on what Michael can take back to his leadership.
evals.expected_output: citizens-bank-demo-script.md shaped for champion_enablement (single contact, no DM present), 25-35 min runtime, closes with 'what to show Joe' framing. citizens-bank-demo-brief.md for AE. No Bain/AWS Bedrock mention. Uses 'scattered everywhere' verbatim.
assertions: Script runtime is 25-35 min (champion enablement, not a full technical deep-dive)
Human story centers on Michael's role and the internal problem he's trying to solve
Close positions the demo as something Michael can show Joe — internal ammunition framing
No mention of Bain, AWS Bedrock, or any competitor in scene talking points (context/do-not-mention sections may name them for SE awareness)
Uses 'scattered everywhere' or equivalent verbatim from discovery
Does not use internal sales terms (champion, deal stage, ICP)
Demo brief is one page and written for the AE, not the SE

evals.prompt: Generate the demo script for Deutsche Telekom SOC-T. Audience is a mixed SOC team. We want to cover ML anomaly detection, ES|QL threat hunting, and AI Assistant — ELSER needs setup first.
evals.expected_output: dt-soct-demo-script.md with 3 scenes, ML first (earn trust), ES|QL second, AI Assistant third with setup caveat. Human story is a SOC analyst. Exec bridge at each transition. Platform note for ELSER setup requirement.
assertions: ML anomaly detection is Scene 1 (earn trust — they already use it)
AI Assistant scene includes explicit pre-demo setup note for LLM connector
Human story is a SOC analyst, not a generic 'user'
Exec bridge present at each scene transition
Platform notes section references the amber audit status and pre-demo task list
No scenes scripted for Agent Builder or Workflows (upgrade_required)

evals.prompt: Write the demo script for the Thermo Fisher call with Karen. Thursday is the deadline — keep it tight.
evals.expected_output: thermo-fisher-demo-script.md with urgency reflected, RAG demo focus, Karen as decision maker in the room, specific scenario referencing historical project data. Brief for AE.
assertions: Script reflects Thursday deadline urgency — tight runtime, no padding
Demo scenario references historical project data or institutional memory pain point
Karen Pendergraft addressed as decision maker in audience section
RAG or semantic search is the primary feature scene
Confirmation doc language does not use internal sales terms
Next steps section asks for specific data or access needed for POC
